nasb.text: And He took with Him Peter and the two sons of Zebedee, and began to be grieved and distressed.

esv.text: And taking with him Peter and the two sons of Zebedee, he began to be sorrowful and troubled.

cnv.text: 他帶了彼得和西庇太的兩個兒子一起去，心裡憂愁難過，

ccb.text: 祂带了彼得和西庇太的两个儿子一起去。祂心里非常忧伤痛苦，

csbs.text: 他带了彼得和西庇太的两个儿子一起去，开始感到忧虑，极其难过，
